name: VORTEX XMD
description: Advanced WhatsApp Bot by HansTz — VORTEX XMD

SESSION_ID.description: Your WhatsApp session ID from the pairing tool.

MODE.description: Bot mode: public / private / inbox / group.

AUTO_TYPING.description: Show typing indicator when a message is received.

AUTO_RECORDING.description: Show recording indicator when a message is received.

AUTO_STATUS_REACT.description: Auto react to statuses with random emojis.

AUTO_STATUS_REPLY.description: Auto send a message after viewing a status.

AUTO_STATUS_MSG.description: Message sent when AUTO_STATUS_REPLY is true.

AUTO_REACT.description: React with random emojis on every incoming message.

CUSTOM_REACT.description: Use a custom emoji list for reactions instead of the default.

CUSTOM_REACT_EMOJIS.description: Comma-separated emoji list for custom reactions.

AUTO_REPLY.description: Auto reply based on data/autoreply.json keywords.

AUTO_STICKER.description: Auto convert every image into a sticker.

ALWAYS_ONLINE.description: Keep bot presence as always online.

CHAT_BOT.description: Enable AI chatbot mode for conversations.

ANTI_LINK.description: Global anti-link switch. Per-group modes set via .antilink command.

ANTI_VV.description: Open view-once messages and forward to owner.

ANTI_DEL_PATH.description: 'log' = send to owner inbox | 'same' = resend in same chat.

ANTI_BAD.description: Delete messages containing bad words in groups.

WELCOME.description: Send welcome and goodbye messages in groups.

ADMIN_EVENTS.description: Notify when a member is promoted or demoted.

MENTION_REPLY.description: Auto reply when someone mentions the bot.

MENU_IMAGE_URL.description: Image URL used for the menu and mention reply.

ALIVE_IMG.description: Image URL used for the alive/uptime command.

DESCRIPTION.description: Bot description shown in menu footer.
